title: Announcement on preSPAX Trading Termination and Platform Buyback Compensation
content:
Dear Users,
Due to anomalies in liquidity management and trade matching from the preSPAX project team, the platform will conduct a unified buyback and refund for eligible preSPAX holders to ensure a secure asset-handling experience.
Trading for the preSPAX/USDT pair will be suspended on July 2, 2026, at 3:00 (UTC). From that moment on, buy, sell, and new order placement features will no longer be supported.
Once trading is suspended, the system will automatically process all unexecuted and partially executed orders. Any USDT frozen in buy orders will be returned to user accounts, and preSPAX frozen in sell orders will be released back to available assets and included in the subsequent buyback statistics. Executed portions of orders will be recorded in your asset history based on the actual trade results.
The platform will use the preSPAX closing price on July 2, 2026, at 00:00 (UTC) as the basis for the final buyback price. Eligible users' preSPAX holdings will be converted and refunded to their accounts in USDT on the same day.
Furthermore, to show our appreciation for your understanding and support, the platform will distribute an additional 50 USDT in platform Futures Bonus to eligible users as compensation.
The product cards, trading entrances, and buying/selling functions related to preSPAX will be officially delisted on July 3, 2026, at 3:00 (UTC). After the delisting, users will no longer be able to access preSPAX-related trading pages.
Thank you for your understanding and continuous support. If you have any questions, please contact us promptly at: support@zoomex.com
The Zoomex Team

title: [Spot]ARX  is now available on Zoomex Spot!
content:
Dear Zoomex Users,
We are thrilled to announce that ARX is now available on Zoomex Spot!
Launch Details:
- ARX Deposits Open: 25, 6, 2026, at 10:00  (UTC)
- ARX Spot Trading Begins: 25, 6, 2026, at 10:00  (UTC)
- ARX Withdrawals Open: 25, 6, 2026, at 10:00  (UTC)
Please note that delays may occur. Deposits and withdrawals will be processed via the SOL network.
About ARX:
Arcium is a decentralized confidential computing network that enables applications to process sensitive data without exposing it to any single party. Powered by advanced Multi-Party Computation (MPC), Arcium allows data to remain encrypted throughout the entire computation process, unlocking secure use cases across AI, finance, identity, healthcare, and other data-intensive industries.The network is composed of decentralized Arx nodes that collaborate to perform computations on secret-shared data. These nodes are organized into clusters and operate within customizable MPC eXecution Environments (MXEs), which allow developers to define security assumptions, computation parameters, and execution settings. Through cryptographic guarantees and economic incentives, Arcium delivers trustless, confidential, and verifiable computation at scale.Often described as a “Confidential Supercomputer,” Arcium combines its distributed operating system, arxOS, with MXEs and the Arcis developer framework to make privacy-preserving applications easier to build. By enabling secure data collaboration without sacrificing confidentiality, Arcium aims to become the foundational infrastructure for the next generation of decentralized and privacy-first applications.

About USD1（World Liberty Financial USD）:
USD1 is a U.S. dollar-pegged stablecoin launched in March 2025 by World Liberty Financial (WLFI) in collaboration with Binance. Initially issued on Ethereum and Binance Smart Chain, USD1 is fully backed 1:1 by U.S. short-term Treasury bills, dollar deposits, and other cash equivalents. The reserves are held by institutional custodian BitGo, audited by third-party accounting firms, and verified through Chainlink's Proof-of-Reserves (PoR) mechanism to ensure transparency and security.Managed centrally by WLFI, USD1 includes features such as account freezing, transaction blacklisting, and adjustable policy controls. The project aims to bridge traditional finance (TradFi) and decentralized finance (DeFi), offering a compliant and politically connected alternative to algorithmic or unregulated stablecoins. WLFI positions USD1 as a secure, institution-ready asset tailored for seamless, cross-border transactions.The association with the Trump family adds a unique political branding to USD1, driving significant market interest. This attention has helped the token gain traction among both retail and institutional investors. WLFI emphasizes that USD1 delivers the credibility and safeguards of traditional finance while empowering DeFi innovation—making it an appealing choice for sovereign wealth funds and major institutions alike.

title: UTA (Unified Trading Account) Is Now Live — Key Highlights
content:
Dear Users,
We’re pleased to announce that UTA (Unified Trading Account) is now officially available.
By upgrading to UTA, you can manage assets more efficiently and improve capital usage, making trading clearer, more flexible, and more streamlined. Below is a quick overview of its main features 👇
🌟 Key Features of UTA
1. One Account for All Assets
- Spot and derivatives assets are combined into a single account
- No manual transfers needed between different accounts
2. Two Margin Modes for Different Trading Needs
- Isolated Margin: Each asset is used only for its corresponding contracts (e.g., USDT for USDT contracts only)
- Cross Margin: All assets are valued in USD and shared as margin for spot margin and derivatives trading
3. Unrealized PnL Can Be Used as Margin
- Floating profits from open positions can be counted as available margin
- Funds can be used more flexibly without closing positions
4. Multiple Assets Supported as Margin
- Up to 9 cryptocurrencies can be used as collateral or margin
- Improves overall capital efficiency
5. USD-Based Asset Display
- All assets are shown in USD value
- Helps users clearly track total assets and margin status
6. Improved Risk Monitoring
- Liquidation risk is monitored using the Maintenance Margin Ratio (MMR)
7. Flexible Borrowing
- Interest-free automatic borrowing is available (USDT/USDC only)
- Repayment assets can be freely selected
👉 How to Upgrade to UTA
Web: Go to the Assets page or Trading page and click “Upgrade to UTA”
App: Open the App → Go to the Trading page → Tap “Upgrade to UTA”
✨ The upgrade takes only a few minutes. Choose your preferred platform and start a more efficient trading experience today.
📘 Learn More
Please refer to our Trading Account Guide for detailed information.
📩 Customer Support
If you have any questions during the upgrade or usage of UTA, please contact us:
Email: support@zoomex.com
Thank you for your continued support and trust in Zoomex.

title: ZOOMEX 2026 New Year Address: Summit New Heights. No Limits Ahead.
content:
Dear Valued Zoomex Users,
Time moves forward, and our direction has never been clearer.
As we step into 2026, Zoomex celebrates its fifth year since founding. For us, the fourth anniversary was more than a milestone—it was a moment to reaffirm that our path is the right one.
Over the past four years, we have been focused on one mission:
Making trading simpler, clearer, and more trustworthy.
2025: Turning Choices into Results
This year marked a pivotal stage for Zoomex, transitioning from steady growth to structural maturity.
Over 3 Million Users Worldwide
Crossing 3 million registered users means deeper liquidity, more robust system performance, and a higher standard of responsibility we must uphold.
Making Assets Truly Accessible
The launch of the Zoomex Card is not just a concept—it’s a concrete step toward making crypto assets usable, controllable, and understandable in real-world payment scenarios.
Compliance & Transparency Are More Than Words
We have completed AUSTRAC registration in Australia, joined the CODE VASP Alliance, and continue to undergo annual professional security audits and risk assessments conducted by Hacken. Every security, compliance, and risk control measure is designed for one goal:
so users don’t just “trust us,” they can “verify us.”
Brand as an Expression of Values
Partnerships with MoneyGram Haas F1 and world-class athlete Emiliano Martínez are not mere marketing—they reflect Zoomex’s commitment to professionalism, discipline, and long-term vision.
---
### The Three Principles We Uphold
Zoomex has reached today not through complex products, but through disciplined judgment.
Simplicity: A Higher Standard of System Capability
We continue to eliminate unnecessary processes and distractions, keeping only the core structures that truly impact trading decisions.
A professional platform should never let users be drained by complexity.
User First: Structure, Not Slogan
From “Position equals Account” asset logic to fair and transparent trading flows;
from optional KYC to one-on-one VIP support, we respect diversity and every user’s need for control over their assets.
Trust Must Be Verifiable
System stability, matching efficiency, security audits—these are not for marketing—they run quietly, reliably in the background.
Trading should always return to rationality and order.
---
### 2026: Doing What’s Right, Even Better
If the first four years were about confirming our direction, 2026 is about going deeper, steadier, and longer-term.
No chasing short-term hype, no creating unnecessary complexity.
We will continue to optimize structure, experience, and security, focusing on what trading itself should be.
This is Zoomex’s vision for the future—and our promise to every user.
In 2026, let’s continue racing toward the future with a champion’s spirit!
Wishing you a Happy New Year and steady growth for your assets!
Welcome to our 4th Anniversary Recap Video!
— The Zoomex Team

title: Zoomex Is Now Officially Registered with AUSTRAC Australia!
content:
Dear Zoomex Users,
At Zoomex, the safety and protection of our users have always been our top priorities. We actively collaborate with regulatory authorities across the globe to provide a secure and trustworthy trading environment for all.
We’re pleased to announce that:
Zoomex is now officially registered with AUSTRAC (Australian Transaction Reports and Analysis Centre).
We also hold MSB (Money Services Business) licenses in the United States and Canada, as well as registration with the U.S. National Futures Association (NFA).
Guided by our user-first philosophy, Zoomex is committed to building a simple, secure, and compliant crypto asset trading platform that users can trust. As we expand our global footprint, we firmly believe that compliance is not a barrier to user freedom, but a fundamental foundation for sustainable growth and user protection.
Current Regulatory Licenses and Security Certifications Zoomex Has Obtained:
- 🇦🇺 AUSTRAC Registration (Australia)
- 🇺🇸 MSB License (USA)
- 🇺🇸 NFA Registration (U.S. National Futures Association)
- 🇨🇦 MSB License (Canada)
- ✅ Hacken Security Audit Certification
We recognize that compliance is not just a reflection of strong corporate governance — it’s also the cornerstone of user trust and long-term platform growth. Completing the AUSTRAC registration marks another key milestone in Zoomex’s global compliance strategy.We will continue to enhance platform stability, improve transparency, and strengthen risk control through third-party security audits and robust compliance mechanisms — all to provide you with a safe, reliable trading experience.
Thank you for your continued trust and support.
The Zoomex Team

title: [Spot] Artrade ($ATR) will be listed on Zoomex!
content:
Dear Zoomex Users,
We’re excited to announce that Artrade ($ATR) is going to be list on our Spot market the next Monday 1st July at 10:00 UTC — one of the most innovative projects in the Real World Asset (RWA) space — is now listed on our platform. This integration marks a new step in our mission to offer digital assets backed by tangible, real-world value.
🖼️ What Is Artrade?
Artrade is a marketplace that brings the power of blockchain to the world of fine art, luxury watches, gold, wine, and other high-value collectibles. Through its “no-loss” raffle system, users can stake the native $ATR token to win real items with up to 40% discounts. Best of all? Even if you don’t win, you still get part of your staked tokens back.
Launched in Paris in 2021 and built on the Solana blockchain, Artrade combines energy efficiency, low transaction fees, and a seamless user experience.
🔧 How Does It Work?
- No-loss raffles: Stake $ATR to enter raffles. Winners get exclusive real-world items at discounted prices, and non-winners receive a portion of their tokens back.
- Real-world assets, real value: Gold bars, Rolex watches, certified artwork, fine wine — all 100% verified and shipped with authenticity guarantees.
- Community-driven economy: 30% of the $ATR supply is allocated to purchasing new assets, while trading fees fund ongoing platform development.
✅ Why It Matters
Artrade isn’t just for collectors or luxury enthusiasts. It represents a new digital economy built on real-world assets, where the token has tangible backing and real utility.
The community has already shown strong support:

To meet the diversified needs of global traders, Zoomex will officially launch the JPYUSDT Forex Contract on April 15, 2025 (UTC+8). This contract is settled in USDT, supports flexible long and short trading, and has no expiration date, enabling users to efficiently seize opportunities in the forex market’s fluctuations!
Product Overview
- Trading Pair: JPYUSDT
- Contract Type: USDT-settled perpetual contract; priced in JPY as the base currency.
- Minimum Order Size: 100 JPY
- Maximum Order Size: 20,000,000 JPY
- Transaktionsgebühr: 0.06%
- Position Mode: One-way position
- Settlement Rules: All margin, profits, and losses are calculated in USDT (e.g., holding 1 JPY contract, if JPY price increases by $0.1, profit will be 0.1 USDT)
- Expiration Date: No expiration date for JPYUSDT Forex Contract
- Order Type: Order by quantity
- Leverage Support: 1X to 100X
Platform Access:
- JPYUSDT trading is currently available only on the web platform.
- For security and full feature access, please log in on the official Zoomex website via PC.
- Mobile users can also access full services via browser at https://www.zoomex.com.
Thank you for your understanding and support.
Differences between JPYUSDT Forex Contract and Standard Perpetual Contracts
1. JPYUSDT does not display the order book. Zoomex uses a third-party forex pricing strategy and matches orders using real-time fair market prices from the forex market, ensuring minimal slippage.
2. JPYUSDT has designated market closure hours, which follow traditional forex market trading schedules.
- During Daylight Saving Time (UTC+8), trading is available from Monday 5:00 to Saturday 5:00.
- During Standard Time (UTC+8), trading is available from Monday 6:00 to Saturday 6:00.
Please refer to platform announcements for holiday closure schedules.
3. JPYUSDT charges a funding rate every 8 hours, with the charge times at 12 AM, 8 AM, and 4 PM UTC. No funding rate is charged on weekends and public holidays. The rate is determined by overnight interest rates in the forex market.
4. Aside from the above differences, the trading logic for JPYUSDT follows the same principles as the USDT perpetual contracts.

title: Zoomex Launches Liquidity Mining Financial Investment Products
content:
Liquidity mining is a decentralized finance mechanism that allows participants to provide some of their crypto assets to various liquidity pools, from which they’re rewarded with tokens and fees.
How to Earn from Liquidity Mining?
Zoomex offers a variety of liquidity pools based on the Automated Market Maker (AMM) model. Each pool consists of a pair of tokens. By depositing tokens into Zoomex's liquidity pools, you can participate as a liquidity provider. When trades take place within the pool, a portion of the trading fees contributes to your earnings.
Advantages of Liquidity Mining on Zoomex:
1. Leverage Support
With leveraged liquidity mining, you can add up to 5x leverage to maximize your returns. Reinvestment is available whenever your earnings exceed 1 USDT.
2. Automatic Rebalance
For a liquidity provider, if you've chosen to add a pair of tokens, the system will automatically process conversion to ensure that the two tokens are of equal value when they're added to the liquidity pool. If you choose to add a single token, the system will automatically convert half of its value to another token in the pool.
3. Low Slippage
Our liquidity pools offer the advantage of low slippage, ensuring quicker transaction times for token swaps.
Potential Risks
Zoomex's Liquidity Mining is not a risk-free product. Liquidity provision is subject to impermanent loss, and the yield amount isn’t guaranteed.
1. Impermanent Loss
With liquidity mining comes the risk of impermanent loss, a phenomenon that occurs due to price changes in the underlying assets.
2. Liquidation Risks With Leverage
Leveraging of positions naturally comes with increased risk of liquidation, although liquidation risk is lower with liquidity mining as compared to derivatives contracts. In this case, you may add more USDT to lower your leverage in order to avoid liquidation.
Choose Zoomex Earn and swiftly embark on your journey to financial growth!
For any questions, please email us at support@zoomex.com
Best regards,
The Zoomex Team

title: Announcement: Support for the Polygon (MATIC) Token Swap to Polygon (POL)
content:
Dear Zoomex Users,
We are pleased to inform you that Zoomex will support the swap of Polygon (MATIC) tokens to Polygon (POL).
MATIC Deposits and Withdrawals:
At 09:00 (UTC) on September 9, 2024, MATIC deposits and withdrawals will be suspended. Please note that any MATIC tokens deposited after this time will not be credited to your account.
Token Swap:
- MATIC tokens will assume the ticker of POL tokens on Zoomex.
- All MATIC tokens will be swapped to POL at a ratio of 1 MATIC = 1 POL.
Spot:
Starting from September 9, 2024, 09:00 (UTC), Zoomex will delist and cease trading on all spot trading pairs for MATIC. All open orders will be automatically removed.
Contracts:
On September 6, 2024, 10:00 (UTC):
- The MATICUSDT perpetual contract will be delisted and no longer available for trading.
- All valid and conditional orders for MATICUSDT perpetual contracts will be canceled.
- All open MATICUSDT perpetual contracts will be closed based on the average index price during the last 30 minutes before delisting.
Convert:
MATIC-related trading pairs will be delisted from the Zoomex Convert platform at 09:00 (UTC) on September 9, 2024.
We will announce the deposit and withdrawal schedules for POL tokens once the token swap process is complete. We kindly ask you to manage your orders and positions accordingly based on the above information.
We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. Should you have any questions, please feel free to contact us at: support@zoomex.com.

title: Update on USDT Perpetual Contract Risk Limit: Transitioning from Manual to Auto Adjustment
content:
To enhance users’ Derivatives trading experience, Zoomex will be transitioning the adjustment method of Derivatives risk limits from manual control to automatic adjustments based on the values of your positions and active orders.
The effective date of this update is as follows:
Web: March 14, 2024, 09:00 (UTC)
APP: Starting from version 3.7.0 (expected to be available on app stores on March 15, 2024)
Afterward, manual risk limit adjustments on both web and app platforms will no longer be available.
Please note that your leverage determines the maximum position value that can be opened. Automatic adjustment does not alter the leverage you set. Instead, it intelligently adjusts the risk limit tier based on each active order you place and each filled order, staying within the maximum allowed position value. This ensures the security of your account and keeps your position at the most suitable risk limit tier.
Thank you for your unwavering support of Zoomex. If you have any questions, please submit them to: https://help.zoomex.com/en/request

title: ✉️ As 2023 comes to a close, a special message from Zoomex to our valued users.
content:
Dear Zoomex Users,
Good day！
Emerging at the close of 2021, Zoomex has experienced the cryptocurrency industry's highs and lows over the last two years. Now, as 2023 draws to a close, we can confidently say that our growth and achievements have been driven by the unwavering trust and support of our millions of users. We're grateful for your companionship on this journey as you've been with us every step of the way, witnessing our evolution and strides forward. Thank you for being a part of our continued story.
Zoomex Highlights of the Year:
"2,000,000"—— By the end of 2023, Zoomex has surpassed the 2 million user registrations mark.
"283"—— Zoomex offers users 283 popular trading pairs and leverages up to 150x.
"4B"—— Our daily trading volume has reached 4 billion US dollars.
We've become an official partner of the Ferrari racing team, sponsoring the promising young driver Ollie Bearman.
Breaking Industry Norms
Innovation is a core business value that we consistently uphold. In 2023, we launched the Zoomex Games section, introducing three acclaimed games: "To the Moon," "One USTD Treasure Hunt," and "Lucky Draw." These games provide users with a more diverse and enjoyable experience related to cryptocurrency trading.
Customer First
Through extensive customer surveys, we delve into user needs and pain points, continuously refining product strategies that better align with the trading habits of different user types. We introduced well-received products such as zero-interest Deposit and Capital Increase and the VIP program, alongside consistent upgrades and iterations on our existing product line.
Safety and Transparency
We protect every user's assets with a multi-signal (multi-signature) cold/hot wallet system, ensuring 100% security. We promise to compensate users for any incidents, guaranteeing 100% coverage of all losses. In the coming year, we will uphold the principles of safety and transparency, continually enhancing the platform's security and transparency to ensure every transaction on our platform is secure and reliable.
Anonymous Spirit
In the past year, we have adhered to the spirit of anonymity in the blockchain industry, providing you with a secure, flexible, and freedom-filled trading platform without KYC. With this philosophy, we commit to doing our utmost to provide you with more autonomy and a more flexible, free trading experience on Zoomex.
2023 is a crucial year for the Bitcoin ecosystem as it moves toward new heights. Faced with significant challenges in both digital assets and traditional markets, the year-end sees a revival after a period of dormancy in the Bitcoin-related ecosystem. The prosperity of on-chain ecosystems, expectations of the approval of spot ETFs, anticipation of halving, and the anticipated interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve, coupled with substantial momentum from institutional investors entering the scene, have collectively driven significant market growth as we approach the end of this year. Facing the upcoming new year, the future development of the crypto industry still holds vast possibilities in investors' minds. We firmly believe that with the cold fading away, a vibrant and promising spring is just around the corner.
Simultaneously, Zoomex will persistently strive to enhance platform security, trading experience, and service quality, dedicating ourselves to providing you with more diversified products and convenient services. We look forward to continuing this journey together and witnessing a brilliant future for the cryptocurrency industry.
We wish you a warm and happy New Year!
Zoomex Team

title: USDT Perpetual: Risk Limit Adjustment for IGUUSDT
content:
Zoomex will be adjusting the risk limit and applicable leverage for IGUUSDT Perpetual Contracts to provide you with a better trading experience. The adjustments will take effect and auto apply to your account on Dec 28, 2023 at 11:30AM UTC.
The specific adjustments are as follows:
By Dec 28, 2023, 11:30 AM UTC, if your position does not meet the new margin requirements resulting in the adjustment failed to apply to your account, you will only be allowed to reduce your IGUUSDT position, and any orders that would increase the position size will be restricted until you select a supported risk limit or leverage. When a 10-day buffer period is due (7 Jan, 2024, 11:30 AM UTC), the system will automatically apply the new risk parameters to your account, and your position may be exposed to liquidation risk.
Hence, it is advised that you manage your position or account risk by transferring more funds to accommodate new risk limit adjustment within the 10-day buffer period to avoid potential liquidation risk.

title: Important Update: Adjusted Risk Limits for CEEKUSDT Perpetual Contract
content:
Dear Zoomex Traders,
We are constantly striving to enhance your trading experience and provide a more secure trading environment. As part of our ongoing efforts to optimize risk management and align with market conditions, we are making adjustments to the risk limits and the associated leverage levels for the CEEKUSDT Perpetual Contract. The new risk settings will be implemented starting from November 14, 2023, at 10:00 AM (UTC).
The specific adjustments are as follows:
By 10:00 AM (UTC) on November 14, 2023, new margin requirements will come into effect. If your positions are not in alignment with the new requirements at the time of the adjustment, your ability to increase your CEEKUSDT positions will be temporarily suspended. However, you will still retain the capability to reduce your existing positions. You will have a 10-day grace period, until November 24, 2023, at 10:00 AM (UTC) to adjust your margin. During this time, we highly recommend that you evaluate your positions and adjust your funds accordingly to meet the new margin requirements and mitigate the risk of forced liquidation.
To avoid the possibility of automatic adjustments or forced liquidation, please carefully review your current CEEKUSDT positions and consider adding additional funds to your trading account to meet the new margin requirements. Ensure that your open orders do not inadvertently increase your position beyond a level supportable under the new risk parameters. Utilize the 10-day buffer period to make any necessary changes without pressure. Proactive adjustments during this time will enable you to maintain control over your trades and protect your investments.
Thank you for your unwavering support! For further questions, please contact: https://help.zoomex.com/en/request

title: Deposit and Withdrawal fees
content:
Zoomex does not charge any fees for internal cryptocurrency deposits and withdrawals. However, for withdrawals processed via blockchain, the relevant gas fees of the chain will be applied.

title: ✉️ A 2022 Year-end Letter from Zoomex
content:
Dearest Zoomex users,
Good day！
In the past 2022, Zoomex has won the trust and favor of 1 million+ users, which is not easy. On the occasion of the coming of the New Year, all Zoomex team members extend their warmest greetings and sincere thanks to you with gratitude. 2022 is destined to be an extraordinary year in the crypto world. In such a year of ups and downs and thrilling, thank you for witnessing the growth, progress, and development of Zoomex, and walking with us as always.
About 2022
We successfully obtained two licenses: the MSB License in the United States and Canada.
We signed two official partners: Zoomex became the only official partner of Villarreal CF in the cryptocurrency industry, and the Japanese top-tier actress Hebei Mayuko Kawakita as our official brand ambassador of Zoomex.
Only a few months after launching, Zoomex was listed on Coinmarketcap.
"1,000,000". By the end of 2022, the Zoomex user family reached 1 million.
As a born-to-global crypto derivative trading platform, our users are located in 16 countries and regions on all continents of the world. Our team members are located in corners of the world, including Europe, America, Japan, South Korea, Southeast Asia, and Africa.
We know very well that every gain of Zoomex along the way comes from the trust of users. The process of building trust is long, but losing it is instant. Therefore, we have always put user safety first as our core value, and every team member is always practicing it—promoting the development of the crypto industry in a sustainable and long-term way while protecting every Zoomex user.
About 2023
We can confidently say that Zoomex is ready to welcome the new year. No matter what challenges the industry will face, Zoomex's excellent, diverse, professional team with a mission and the simplest and purest business model will be unstoppable. We do not fear the wind and rain but always ride the wind and waves.
About Ourselves
Zoomex does not make any investment in various projects, nor will it issue platform tokens. At the same time, we also follow the anonymous spirit of crypto as much as possible to provide users with high-quality services in a non-KYC environment. We firmly believe that the simplest and purest business model is the most solid armor for this industry to resist external changes, which is one of the most important reasons why we can have sufficient reserves to deal with the "black swan" incidents. In the future, we will continue to focus on creating smoother derivative trading products, comprehensively improving user service experience, continuing to expand the team, and becoming the most trustworthy derivative trading platform.
About the Market
Although the market is still affected by the stressful emotions brought about by mature negative incidents. We all know that history is a lesson. Before the arrival of every bull market, it will experience the chaos and darkness of a bear market, no matter whether it takes a month or a year for the market to recover. When we get out of the bear market, we will all become stronger and more confident for sure. The flame of this belief has never been extinguished in the hearts of everyone in the crypto industry.
Finally, thank you again for your preference and trust in Zoomex. Let us continue to move forward hand in hand in the cryptocurrency world!
Happy new year and cheers!
Sincerely,
Zoomex Team

title: Zoomex Officially Joins CODE VASP Alliance
content:
Dear Zoomex Users,
Zoomex is proud to announce that we have officially joined the CODE VASP Alliance (Connect Digital Exchanges) and successfully integrated the FATF Travel Rule compliance system.
This milestone highlights our commitment to meeting the security and transparency standards required of digital asset exchanges under the FATF Travel Rule framework, further strengthening our compliance in global and local market operations.
Founded in 2022, the CODE VASP Alliance aims to help Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASPs) meet Travel Rule compliance requirements. Supported by this system, identity information between the sending and receiving parties can be securely and encryptively transmitted, enhancing transaction transparency and traceability.
This integration further strengthens Zoomex’s infrastructure in security, compliance, and information governance, reaffirming our brand philosophy of “Simple × User-Friendly × Ultra-Fast.” We are committed to providing a more stable, secure, and trustworthy trading environment for users worldwide.
In addition, Zoomex has obtained multiple regulatory licenses, including Canada MSB, U.S. MSB, U.S. NFA, and Australia AUSTRAC, and has successfully passed a system security audit by Hacken, a globally recognized cybersecurity firm.
Thank you for your continued trust and support. As always, Zoomex remains dedicated to delivering a safe, fast, and seamless trading experience for every user.
Wishing you successful trades,
The Zoomex Team

title: Annonce concernant la fin du trading de preSPAX et le rachat avec compensation
content:
Chers utilisateurs,
En raison d’anomalies affectant la gestion de la liquidité et l’appariement des ordres du projet preSPAX, la plateforme procédera à un rachat unifié des avoirs en preSPAX des utilisateurs éligibles, suivi d’un remboursement, afin de garantir un traitement sécurisé de leurs actifs.
Le trading de la paire preSPAX/USDT prendra fin le 2 juillet 2026 à 03:00 (UTC). À partir de cette heure, les fonctions d’achat, de vente et de création de nouveaux ordres ne seront plus disponibles.
Une fois le trading suspendu, le système traitera automatiquement tous les ordres non exécutés ou partiellement exécutés. Les USDT gelés dans les ordres d’achat seront restitués sur les comptes des utilisateurs. Les preSPAX gelés dans les ordres de vente seront libérés dans les actifs disponibles et inclus dans le calcul du rachat ultérieur. Les portions d’ordres déjà exécutées seront enregistrées dans l’historique des actifs conformément aux résultats réels des transactions.
La plateforme utilisera le prix de clôture de preSPAX à 00:00 (UTC) le 2 juillet 2026 comme référence pour déterminer le prix final de rachat. Les avoirs en preSPAX des utilisateurs éligibles seront convertis et remboursés en USDT sur leurs comptes le jour même.
Par ailleurs, afin de vous remercier de votre compréhension et de votre soutien, la plateforme créditera également les utilisateurs éligibles d’un Bonus Futures de 50 USDT à titre de compensation.
Les fiches produit, les accès de trading ainsi que les fonctions d’achat et de vente liés à preSPAX seront officiellement retirés le 3 juillet 2026 à 03:00 (UTC). Après ce retrait, les utilisateurs ne pourront plus accéder aux pages de trading liées à preSPAX.
Nous vous remercions de votre compréhension et de votre soutien continu. Si vous avez des questions, veuillez nous contacter à l’adresse suivante : support@zoomex.com
L’équipe Zoomex

À propos de ARX:
ARX est la crypto-monnaie native de The Open Network (TON), une blockchain de Couche 1 (Layer 1) à haute performance qui utilise un mécanisme de consensus Proof-of-Stake (PoS). TON prend en charge des transactions rapides et à faible coût, et fournit l'infrastructure pour un large éventail de cas d'utilisation, y compris les paiements, la DeFi, les NFTs et les applications décentralisées (dApps).
Le jeton natif de TON a été renommé de TON à ARX, faisant revivre le nom d'origine du jeton introduit dans le tout premier livre blanc (whitepaper) du projet. Alors que TON reste le nom du réseau blockchain, ARX sert de crypto-monnaie native et est utilisé pour les frais de transaction, le staking, ainsi que pour diverses applications et services à travers l'écosystème TON.

title: [Maintenance du système] Avis de maintenance du service Zoomex Card
content:
Chers utilisateurs de Zoomex,
Afin d'améliorer la stabilité du système et d'optimiser votre expérience, le service Zoomex Card fera l'objet d'une maintenance du système et d'une mise à niveau des serveurs le 17 juin 2026, de 01h00 à 03h00 (UTC).
Pendant la période de maintenance, tous les services liés à la Zoomex Card seront temporairement indisponibles et les portas d'accès correspondants seront mis hors ligne.
Les fonctionnalités affectées comprennent, sans s'y limiter :
- Les processus d'activation et de demande de Zoomex Card
- Connexion et accès au compte Zoomex Card
- Les transactions et services associés à la Zoomex Card
- Les fonctions de dépôt et de retrait
- Tout autre service associé à la Zoomex Card
Le calendrier détaillé est le suivant :
Période de maintenance : 17 juin 2026, de 01h00 à 03h00 (UTC)
Portée de l'impact : Tous les services liés à la Zoomex Card
Heure de reprise estimée : 17 juin 2026 à 03h00 (UTC) (Estimation)
Nous vous recommandons de prendre vos dispositions à l'avance et d'éviter toute opération liée à la Zoomex Card pendant la période de maintenance afin d'éviter tout désagrément inutile.
Si la maintenance est terminée plus tôt que prévu, les services concernés reprendront immédiatement sans autre préavis.
Si vous avez des questions, veuillez contacter notre équipe d'assistance client officielle pour obtenir de l'aide.
Merci de votre compréhension et de votre soutien continu.
L'équipe Zoomex

À propos de BILL（Billions Network）:
Billions Network est une infrastructure d'identité numérique axée sur la confidentialité, conçue pour établir la confiance entre les humains et l'IA. Basé sur la technologie du zero-knowledge, il permet aux utilisateurs de prouver qu'ils sont réels sans révéler de données personnelles. En permettant une vérification sécurisée et anonyme sur différents appareils et plateformes, Billions vise à résoudre le problème croissant des identités fictives et des interactions non responsables avec l’IA dans le monde numérique. Le réseau fournit des outils à la fois pour les particuliers et les développeurs, incluant la vérification humaine, des identifiants d’identité réutilisables et des identités vérifiables pour les agents IA. Les utilisateurs peuvent créer des profils officiels, gagner en crédibilité grâce à des badges vérifiés et garder le contrôle sur leurs données. Pour les développeurs, Billions offre une infrastructure permettant de concevoir des applications nécessitant confiance, identité et réputation, tout en préservant la vie privée des utilisateurs. Avec une vision d’économie mondiale de la confiance, Billions Network construit un système évolutif où les identités et les réputations peuvent être vérifiées de manière fluide à travers différents écosystèmes. Soutenu par des partenariats et des intégrations avec de grandes organisations et des écosystèmes blockchain, il vise à créer un futur où chaque interaction entre humains et IA est sécurisée, transparente et digne de confiance.

content:
Estimados usuarios de Zoomex,
¡Estamos encantados de anunciar que USD1（World Liberty Financial USD）ya está disponible en Zoomex Spot!
Detalles del lanzamiento:
- Depósitos zama A biertos: 16 abril, 2026, a las 11:00 AM (UTC+1)
- Comienza la negociación de zama Spot: 16 abril, 2026, a las 11:00 AM (UTC+1)
- Inicio de las retiradas de fondos zama: 16 abril, 2026, a las 11:00 AM (UTC+1)
Tenga en cuenta que pueden producirse demoras. Los depósitos y retiros se procesarán a través de la red Ethereum, BEP20.
Visión general del proyecto:
Acerca de Ape and Pepe zama:
USD1 es una stablecoin vinculada al dólar estadounidense lanzada en marzo de 2025 por World Liberty Financial (WLFI) en colaboración con Binance. Emitida inicialmente en Ethereum y Binance Smart Chain, USD1 está completamente respaldada 1:1 por bonos del Tesoro de EE. UU. a corto plazo, depósitos en dólares y otros equivalentes de efectivo. Las reservas están custodiadas por la institución BitGo, auditadas por firmas contables externas y verificadas mediante el mecanismo Proof-of-Reserves (PoR) de Chainlink para garantizar transparencia y seguridad.
Gestionado de forma centralizada por WLFI, USD1 incluye funciones como congelación de cuentas, bloqueo de transacciones y controles de políticas ajustables. El proyecto busca conectar las finanzas tradicionales (TradFi) con las finanzas descentralizadas (DeFi), ofreciendo una alternativa regulada y con respaldo político frente a stablecoins algorítmicas o no reguladas. WLFI posiciona USD1 como un activo seguro, preparado para instituciones y diseñado para facilitar transacciones transfronterizas sin fricción.
La asociación con la familia Trump aporta una identidad política única a USD1, generando un gran interés en el mercado. Esta atención ha impulsado su adopción tanto entre inversores minoristas como institucionales. WLFI destaca que USD1 combina la credibilidad y las garantías de las finanzas tradicionales con la innovación de DeFi, convirtiéndolo en una opción atractiva para fondos soberanos y grandes instituciones.

title: UTA (Compte de Trading Unifié) est Maintenant Disponible — Points Clés
content:
Chers Utilisateurs,
Nous sommes heureux d’annoncer que UTA (Compte de Trading Unifié) est désormais officiellement disponible.
En passant à UTA, vous pouvez gérer vos actifs plus efficacement et améliorer l’utilisation du capital, rendant le trading plus clair, flexible et optimisé. Voici un aperçu rapide de ses principales fonctionnalités 👇
🌟 Fonctionnalités Clés de l’UTA
1. Un Compte pour Tous les Actifs
- Les actifs spot et dérivés sont regroupés dans un seul compte
- Aucun transfert manuel nécessaire entre différents comptes
2. Deux Modes de Marge pour Différents Besoins de Trading
- Marge Isolée : Chaque actif est utilisé uniquement pour ses contrats correspondants (ex : USDT pour les contrats USDT)
- Marge Croisée : Tous les actifs sont évalués en USD et partagés comme marge pour le spot et le trading dérivé
3. PnL Non Réalisé Peut Être Utilisé Comme Marge
- Les profits flottants des positions ouvertes peuvent être comptés comme marge disponible
- Les fonds peuvent être utilisés plus librement sans clôturer les positions
4. Plusieurs Actifs Supportés Comme Marge
- Jusqu’à 9 crypto-monnaies peuvent être utilisées comme collatéral ou marge
- Améliore l’efficacité globale du capital
5. Affichage des Actifs en USD
- Tous les actifs sont affichés en valeur USD
- Aide les utilisateurs à suivre clairement le total des actifs et l’état de la marge
6. Surveillance des Risques Améliorée
- Le risque de liquidation est surveillé à l’aide du Ratio de Marge de Maintenance (MMR)
7. Emprunt Flexible
- Emprunt automatique sans intérêt disponible (USDT/USDC uniquement)
- Les actifs de remboursement peuvent être choisis librement
👉 Comment Passer à UTA
Web : Accédez à la page Actifs ou Trading et cliquez sur “Upgrade to UTA”
App : Ouvrez l’application → Accédez à la page Trading → Appuyez sur “Upgrade to UTA”
✨ La mise à niveau prend seulement quelques minutes. Choisissez votre plateforme préférée et commencez dès aujourd’hui une expérience de trading plus efficace.
Les nouveaux utilisateurs enregistrés auront un compte UTA activé automatiquement par défaut, sans besoin de mise à jour manuelle.
📘 En Savoir Plus
Veuillez consulter notre Guide des Comptes de Trading pour plus de détails.
📩 Support Client
Si vous avez des questions lors de la mise à niveau ou de l’utilisation d’UTA, veuillez nous contacter :
Email : support@zoomex.com
Merci pour votre soutien continu et votre confiance en Zoomex.

title: ZOOMEX 2026: Atteindre de Nouveaux Sommets, Sans Limites
content:
Chers utilisateurs et amis de Zoomex,
Le temps file, et notre trajectoire n’a jamais été aussi claire.
Alors que nous entrons en 2026, Zoomex célèbre sa cinquième année depuis sa création. Pour nous, le quatrième anniversaire n’était pas seulement un jalon : c’était l’occasion de confirmer que nous sommes sur la bonne voie.
Au cours des quatre dernières années, notre mission est restée la même :
Rendre le trading plus simple, plus clair et plus fiable.
2025 : Transformer les choix en résultats
Cette année a marqué une étape clé pour Zoomex, passant d’une croissance stable à une maturité structurelle.
Plus de 3 millions d’utilisateurs dans le monde
Nous avons désormais plus de 3 millions d’utilisateurs inscrits. Cela signifie une liquidité plus profonde, un système plus robuste, et une responsabilité encore plus grande.
Rendre les actifs réellement accessibles
Le lancement de la Carte Zoomex n’est pas qu’un concept : c’est un pas concret pour rendre les crypto-actifs utilisables, contrôlables et compréhensibles dans le monde réel.
Conformité et transparence : plus que des mots
Nous avons finalisé notre enregistrement auprès d’AUSTRAC en Australie, rejoint la CODE VASP Alliance et effectuons chaque année des audits de sécurité et des évaluations des risques professionnels réalisés par Hacken. Chaque mesure de sécurité, de conformité et de contrôle des risques a un seul but : permettre aux utilisateurs non seulement de « nous faire confiance », mais aussi de « vérifier » cette confiance.
La marque, reflet de nos valeurs
Nos partenariats avec MoneyGram Haas F1 et l’athlète de classe mondiale Emiliano Martínez ne sont pas de simples actions marketing : ils reflètent notre engagement envers le professionnalisme, la discipline et une vision à long terme.
Nos trois principes
Zoomex n’a pas atteint sa position actuelle grâce à des produits complexes, mais par un jugement discipliné.
Simplicité : un standard supérieur de performance
Nous éliminons les processus et distractions inutiles, ne conservant que ce qui impacte vraiment vos décisions de trading.
Une plateforme professionnelle ne doit jamais épuiser ses utilisateurs avec la complexité.
L’utilisateur d’abord : structure, pas slogan
De la logique d’actifs « Position = Compte » aux flux de trading justes et transparents ;
du KYC optionnel à un support VIP individuel, nous respectons la diversité et le besoin de contrôle de chaque utilisateur sur ses actifs.
La confiance doit être vérifiable
Stabilité du système, efficacité du matching, audits de sécurité — ce n’est pas du marketing : tout fonctionne en arrière-plan, de manière fiable.
Le trading doit toujours revenir à la rationalité et à l’ordre.
2026 : Faire mieux ce qui est juste
Si les quatre premières années ont été consacrées à confirmer notre direction, 2026 consiste à aller plus en profondeur, plus loin, et sur le long terme.
Pas de course au battage médiatique, pas de complexité inutile.
Nous continuerons d’optimiser structure, expérience et sécurité, en nous concentrant sur l’essence même du trading.
Voici la vision de Zoomex pour l’avenir — et notre promesse à chaque utilisateur.
En 2026, continuons à avancer vers l’avenir avec l’esprit d’un champion !
Nous vous souhaitons une Bonne Année et une croissance durable et solide de vos actifs !
Découvrez la vidéo récapitulative de notre 4e anniversaire
— L’équipe Zoomex

title: Zoomex est désormais officiellement enregistré auprès de l’AUSTRAC en Australie !
content:
Cher utilisateur de Zoomex,
Chez Zoomex, nous plaçons la sécurité et la protection des utilisateurs au cœur de nos priorités. En collaborant avec les autorités réglementaires à travers le monde, nous visons à créer un environnement de trading sûr et digne de confiance.
Nous sommes heureux d'annoncer que :
Zoomex est désormais officiellement enregistré auprès de l’AUSTRAC(Australian Transaction Reports and Analysis Centre), et détient également des licences de services financiers MSB (Money Services Business) aux États-Unis et au Canada, ainsi qu’un enregistrement auprès de la National Futures Association (NFA) aux États-Unis.
Fidèle à notre vision centrée sur l’utilisateur, Zoomex s’engage à bâtir une plateforme de trading d’actifs numériques intuitive, conforme, et sécurisée. Dans notre démarche d'expansion mondiale, nous croyons que la conformité ne limite pas la liberté des utilisateurs, mais constitue au contraire le socle d’un développement durable et la meilleure garantie de leurs droits.
Certifications de conformité et garanties de sécurité obtenues par Zoomex :
🇦🇺 Enregistrement auprès de l’AUSTRAC (Australie)
🇺🇸 Licence MSB (États-Unis)
🇺🇸 Enregistrement auprès de la National Futures Association (NFA) (États-Unis)
🇨🇦 Licence MSB (Canada)
✅ Audit de sécurité certifié par Hacken
Nous sommes pleinement conscients que la conformité reflète non seulement la capacité de gouvernance d’une entreprise, mais constitue aussi la pierre angulaire de la confiance des utilisateurs et de la durabilité de notre plateforme.
L’obtention de l’enregistrement auprès de l’AUSTRAC marque une nouvelle étape clé dans la stratégie internationale de Zoomex. Nous continuerons  à renforcer la stabilité de la plateforme et la transparence en matière de conformité, tout en nous appuyant sur des mécanismes de gestion des risques diversifiés et des audits de sécurité tiers, afin d’améliorer davantage la transparence et la sécurité globales de la plateforme, et d’offrir à nos utilisateurs un environnement de trading sûr, solide et fiable.
Merci pour votre confiance et votre soutien constants.

title: 🔥 Le nouveau contrat Forex JPYUSDT est désormais disponible sur Zoomex
content:
Chers utilisateurs de Zoomex,
Afin de répondre aux besoins diversifiés des traders mondiaux, Zoomex lancera officiellement le Contrat Forex JPYUSDT. Ce contrat est réglé en USDT, prend en charge les échanges longs et courts flexibles et n'a pas de date d'expiration, permettant aux utilisateurs de saisir efficacement les opportunités des fluctuations du marché des devises !
Présentation du produit :
- Paires de trading : JPYUSDT
- Type de contrat : Contrat perpétuel réglé en USDT ; coté en JPY comme monnaie de base.
- Quantité minimale de commande : 100 JPY
- Quantité maximale par ordre : 20 000 000 JPY
- Frais de transaction : 0,06 %
- Mode de position : Position unidirectionnelle
- Règles de règlement : Tous les marges, bénéfices et pertes sont calculés en USDT (par exemple, si vous détenez 1 contrat JPY et que le prix de JPY augmente de 0,1 USD, le profit sera de 0,1 USDT)
- Date d'expiration : Pas de date d'expiration pour le Contrat Forex JPYUSDT
- Type de commande : Commande par quantité
- Support de levier : De 1X à 100X
Accès à la plateforme :
- Le trading JPYUSDT est actuellement disponible uniquement sur la plateforme web.
- Pour des raisons de sécurité et pour accéder à toutes les fonctionnalités, veuillez vous connecter via le site officiel de Zoomex sur un ordinateur.
- Les utilisateurs mobiles peuvent également accéder à tous les services via leur navigateur à l'adresse suivante : https://www.zoomex.com.
Merci pour votre compréhension et votre soutien.
Différences entre le Contrat Forex JPYUSDT et les Contrats Perpétuels Standards :
1. JPYUSDT ne montre pas le carnet de commandes. Zoomex utilise une stratégie de tarification des devises de tiers et associe les commandes en utilisant les prix du marché équitables en temps réel du marché des devises, garantissant un slippage minimal.
2. Le contrat JPYUSDT suit des heures de fermeture spécifiques, conformément aux horaires traditionnels des marchés du forex.
- Pendant l'heure d'été (UTC+8), le trading est disponible du lundi à 5h00 au samedi à 5h00.
- Pendant l'heure standard (UTC+8), le trading est disponible du lundi à 6h00 au samedi à 6h00.
Veuillez consulter les annonces officielles de la plateforme pour connaître les horaires de fermeture pendant les jours fériés.
3. JPYUSDT applique un taux de financement toutes les 8 heures, avec des horaires de frais à 12 h, 8 h et 16 h UTC. Aucun taux de financement n'est appliqué pendant les week-ends et les jours fériés. Le taux est déterminé par les taux d'intérêt de nuit du marché des devises.
4. En dehors des différences ci-dessus, la logique de trading de JPYUSDT suit les mêmes principes que les contrats perpétuels USDT.

title: Zoomex MCP Server est officiellement lancé : utilisez l’IA pour accéder plus efficacement aux informations de trading
content:
Chers utilisateurs de Zoomex,
🔥Le Zoomex MCP Server est désormais officiellement disponible.
Le Zoomex MCP Server permet de connecter des assistants IA compatibles avec le protocole MCP à l’API de Zoomex, afin de permettre aux utilisateurs de consulter rapidement les données de marché, les actifs, les positions et les informations sur les ordres directement dans des environnements IA, améliorant ainsi l’efficacité de la consultation et de l’organisation des informations de trading.
Qu’est-ce que le Zoomex MCP Server ?
Le Zoomex MCP Server est un service de connexion destiné aux assistants IA. Il prend en charge des clients compatibles MCP tels que Cursor, Claude Desktop, Claude Code, VS Code et Windsurf.
Une fois la configuration effectuée, les utilisateurs peuvent interroger rapidement le solde du compte, les positions actuelles, l’historique des ordres, les données de chandeliers (K-line) ainsi que les dernières transactions via un assistant IA, réduisant ainsi les recherches manuelles et les changements de page.
Exemples :
« Voir le solde de mon compte. »
« Consulter l’historique récent des ordres. »
Quelles fonctionnalités sont actuellement prises en charge ?
Le Zoomex MCP Server se concentre actuellement sur les fonctionnalités de consultation et couvre les principaux scénarios d’information de trading :
1. Consultation des données de marché :
Accès aux derniers prix, carnets d’ordres, graphiques en chandeliers, transactions récentes et informations sur les paires de trading.
2. Consultation des actifs :
Affichage du solde du compte pour une vue rapide de la situation des fonds.
3. Consultation des positions :
Consultation des positions actuelles et suivi de l’exposition.
4. Consultation des ordres et de l'historique :
Consultation des ordres ouverts, des ordres historiques et des enregistrements de transactions pour analyse et suivi.
Pourquoi utiliser le Zoomex MCP Server ?
1. Consultation plus efficace : accès rapide aux données clés de trading sans changer de page.
2. Analyse plus simple : l’assistant IA aide à organiser les données de marché, de compte, de positions et d’ordres.
3. Vue plus claire du compte : compréhension des actifs, positions et ordres via des instructions en langage naturel.
4. Contrôle des permissions : gestion des autorisations, limitation de fréquence, contrôle des risques et audit. Il est recommandé d’activer uniquement les permissions minimales nécessaires.
Remarques importantes avant utilisation :

title: Le Centre de stratégie Zoomex est désormais officiellement en ligne !
content:
Choisissez votre stratégie et lancez facilement le trading automatisé.
Le Centre de stratégie Zoomex est un produit de trading automatisé qui icombine backtesting historique, analyse des résultats, trading en direct et suivi des positions, permettant aux utilisateurs de couvrir l’ensemble du processus, du test de stratégie à l’exécution automatisée.
Que vous soyez débutant explorant les indicateurs techniques, trader disposant déjà de stratégies mais sans capacité d’automatisation, ou utilisateur cherchant à réduire les coûts de gestion et de maintenance des stratégies, vous pouvez expérimenter plus facilement le trading basé sur des stratégies.
Stratégies prises en charge
Stratégies d’indicateurs techniques actuellement disponibles :
- RSI (Relative Strength Index)
- BOLL (Bandes de Bollinger)
- Momentum
- RSI + BOLL
Directions de trading prises en charge :
- Long
- Short
- Double direction (Long + Short)
Produits de trading pris en charge :
Contrat perpétuel BTCUSDT (marge en USDT) Contrat perpétuel ETHUSDT (marge en USDT)
Le système exécute automatiquement les ouvertures et clôtures en fonction des données de marché en temps réel et des conditions de stratégie.
Fonction de backtesting
Avant de lancer une stratégie, vous pouvez effectuer un backtesting historique.
Les utilisateurs peuvent configurer différentes stratégies, paramètres et unités de temps en chandeliers afin d’analyser les performances simulées sur les marchés passés.
Après le backtesting, vous pouvez :
- Consulter les résultats
- Enregistrer la configuration
- Copier en un clic vers le trading en direct
Trading en direct
Après le backtesting, vous pouvez lancer le trading de stratégie en conditions réelles.
Une fois activé, le système va automatiquement :
- Surveiller le marché
- Passer des ordres
- Clôturer les positions
- Mettre à jour les données de trading en temps réel
Le trading de stratégie utilise un modèle de compte de fonds séparé.
Avant activation, les utilisateurs doivent transférer des USDT disponibles depuis leur compte de trading vers le compte stratégie.
Pendant l’utilisation, des fonds supplémentaires peuvent être ajoutés via la fonction « Transfert de fonds ».
Après l’arrêt de la stratégie, le système va :
- Clôturer immédiatement toutes les positions
- Transférer automatiquement les fonds vers le compte de trading
De plus, le trading de stratégie prend en charge les options de take-profit et stop-loss, offrant une gestion des risques plus flexible.
Frais
Aucun frais supplémentaire n’est facturé pour le trading de stratégie.
Seuls les frais de trading standards de la plateforme s’appliquent.
Les réductions via coupons sont également applicables au Centre de stratégie.
Avertissement sur les risques :
Le trading de stratégie et les résultats de backtesting sont fournis à titre indicatif uniquement et ne constituent pas un conseil en investissement. Les données de backtesting sont simulées sur la base des conditions historiques du marché, et les résultats réels peuvent varier en raison de la volatilité et des fluctuations en temps réel. Le trading d’actifs numériques comporte des risques élevés ; veuillez y participer avec prudence.
*Le Centre de Stratégie est actuellement disponible uniquement sur la version web. La version mobile sera lancée prochainement. Restez connectés.

title: Découvrez le nouveau UTA en 90 secondes !
content:
Cher utilisateur,
Le Compte de Trading Unifié (UTA) de Zoomex arrive bientôt !
Nous avons préparé une courte vidéo pour vous aider à comprendre rapidement les fonctionnalités puissantes et les principales améliorations de l’UTA.
🎥 Regardez maintenant : Découvrez comment l’UTA simplifie et rend le trading plus efficace !
👉 Cliquez ici pour regarder sur YouTube
---
🔍 Qu’est-ce que l’UTA ?
Le Compte de Trading Unifié est un modèle “tout-en-un” qui intègre le Spot, les Dérivés et d’autres produits dans un seul compte — plus besoin de passer d’un compte ou portefeuille à un autre.
---
⭐️ Fonctionnalités et points forts de l’UTA
1. Actifs de compte unifiés :
Gérez vos actifs Spot et Futures dans un seul compte UTA, sans changer de compte.
2. Collatéral multi-actifs :
Utilisez plusieurs crypto-monnaies comme garantie ou marge pour maximiser l’efficacité du capital.
3. Modes de marge flexibles :
Supporte à la fois la marge isolée et croisée.
- Marge isolée : Chaque position est calculée séparément, idéal pour les débutants.
- Marge croisée : Toutes les positions partagent la même marge ; les profits peuvent compenser les pertes — idéal pour les utilisateurs avec un capital important ou des stratégies diverses.
4. PnL non réalisé comme marge :
Utilisez les profits non réalisés des positions ouvertes en dérivés comme marge pour plus de flexibilité.
5. Affichage du solde en USD :
Visualisez la valeur totale des actifs et le statut de la marge en USD pour une gestion unifiée et plus claire.
---
⚠️ Différences clés entre UTA et les comptes classiques
1. Efficacité de la marge
- Compte classique :
Les fonds de chaque produit sont calculés séparément ; les fonds inactifs ne peuvent pas être partagés, réduisant l’efficacité du capital.
- UTA :
Tous les actifs sont centralisés dans un compte et peuvent être utilisés comme marge globale, améliorant considérablement l’efficacité.
2. Gestion des risques et marge de maintenance
- Compte classique :
Gestion du risque isolée ; la liquidation d’un compte n’affecte pas les autres.
- UTA :
Gestion des risques croisée ; le système évalue les actifs totaux et les positions pour calculer le risque global, permettant de compenser les positions perdantes avec les gagnantes.
3. Couverture des produits
- Compte classique :
Chaque produit (Spot, contrats perpétuels) nécessite une gestion séparée avec des transferts manuels entre comptes.
- UTA :
Tradez plusieurs produits dans un seul compte, incluant Spot et contrats perpétuels, avec couverture inter-produits.
Opérations simplifiées et expérience de trading plus fluide.
---
📘 Envie d’en savoir plus ?
Consultez notre Guide du Nouveau Compte de Trading.
La mise à jour arrive bientôt — préparez-vous à une expérience de trading plus fluide et flexible !

title: Announcement on preSPAX Trading Termination and Platform Buyback Compensation
content:
Dear Users,
Due to anomalies in liquidity management and trade matching from the preSPAX project team, the platform will conduct a unified buyback and refund for eligible preSPAX holders to ensure a secure asset-handling experience.
Trading for the preSPAX/USDT pair will be suspended on July 2, 2026, at 3:00 (UTC). From that moment on, buy, sell, and new order placement features will no longer be supported.

Any USDT frozen in buy orders will be returned to user accounts, and preSPAX frozen in sell orders will be released back to available assets and included in the subsequent buyback statistics. The platform will use the preSPAX closing price on July 2, 2026, at 00:00 (UTC) as the basis for the final buyback price. Eligible users' preSPAX holdings will be converted and refunded to their accounts in USDT on the same day.

The product cards, trading entrances, and buying/selling functions related to preSPAX will be officially delisted on July 3, 2026, at 3:00 (UTC). After the delisting, users will no longer be able to access preSPAX-related trading pages.

Please note that delays may occur. Deposits and withdrawals will be processed via the SOL network.
About ARX:
Arcium is a decentralized confidential computing network that enables applications to process sensitive data without exposing it to any single party. Powered by advanced Multi-Party Computation (MPC), Arcium allows data to remain encrypted throughout the entire computation process, unlocking secure use cases across AI, finance, identity, healthcare, and other data-intensive industries.The network is composed of decentralized Arx nodes that collaborate to perform computations on secret-shared data. These nodes are organized into clusters and operate within customizable MPC eXecution Environments (MXEs), which allow developers to define security assumptions, computation parameters, and execution settings. Through cryptographic guarantees and economic incentives, Arcium delivers trustless, confidential, and verifiable computation at scale.Often described as a “Confidential Supercomputer,” Arcium combines its distributed operating system, arxOS, with MXEs and the Arcis developer framework to make privacy-preserving applications easier to build. By enabling secure data collaboration without sacrificing confidentiality, Arcium aims to become the foundational infrastructure for the next generation of decentralized and privacy-first applications.

About USD1（World Liberty Financial USD）:
USD1 is a U.S. dollar-pegged stablecoin launched in March 2025 by World Liberty Financial (WLFI) in collaboration with Binance. Initially issued on Ethereum and Binance Smart Chain, USD1 is fully backed 1:1 by U.S. short-term Treasury bills, dollar deposits, and other cash equivalents. The reserves are held by institutional custodian BitGo, audited by third-party accounting firms, and verified through Chainlink's Proof-of-Reserves (PoR) mechanism to ensure transparency and security.Managed centrally by WLFI, USD1 includes features such as account freezing, transaction blacklisting, and adjustable policy controls. The project aims to bridge traditional finance (TradFi) and decentralized finance (DeFi), offering a compliant and politically connected alternative to algorithmic or unregulated stablecoins. WLFI positions USD1 as a secure, institution-ready asset tailored for seamless, cross-border transactions.The association with the Trump family adds a unique political branding to USD1, driving significant market interest. This attention has helped the token gain traction among both retail and institutional investors. WLFI emphasizes that USD1 delivers the credibility and safeguards of traditional finance while empowering DeFi innovation—making it an appealing choice for sovereign wealth funds and major institutions alike.

title: UTA (Unified Trading Account) Is Now Live — Key Highlights
content:
Dear Users,
We’re pleased to announce that UTA (Unified Trading Account) is now officially available.
By upgrading to UTA, you can manage assets more efficiently and improve capital usage, making trading clearer, more flexible, and more streamlined. Below is a quick overview of its main features 👇
🌟 Key Features of UTA
1. One Account for All Assets
- Spot and derivatives assets are combined into a single account
- No manual transfers needed between different accounts
2. Two Margin Modes for Different Trading Needs
- Isolated Margin: Each asset is used only for its corresponding contracts (e.g., USDT for USDT contracts only)
- Cross Margin: All assets are valued in USD and shared as margin for spot margin and derivatives trading
3. Unrealized PnL Can Be Used as Margin
- Floating profits from open positions can be counted as available margin
- Funds can be used more flexibly without closing positions
4. Multiple Assets Supported as Margin
- Up to 9 cryptocurrencies can be used as collateral or margin
- Improves overall capital efficiency
5. USD-Based Asset Display
- All assets are shown in USD value
- Helps users clearly track total assets and margin status
6. Improved Risk Monitoring
- Liquidation risk is monitored using the Maintenance Margin Ratio (MMR)
7. Flexible Borrowing
- Interest-free automatic borrowing is available (USDT/USDC only)
- Repayment assets can be freely selected
👉 How to Upgrade to UTA
Web: Go to the Assets page or Trading page and click “Upgrade to UTA”
App: Open the App → Go to the Trading page → Tap “Upgrade to UTA”
✨ The upgrade takes only a few minutes. Choose your preferred platform and start a more efficient trading experience today.
📘 Learn More
Please refer to our Trading Account Guide for detailed information.
📩 Customer Support
If you have any questions during the upgrade or usage of UTA, please contact us:
Email: support@zoomex.com
Thank you for your continued support and trust in Zoomex.

title: Zoomex Officially Joins CODE VASP Alliance
content:
Dear Zoomex Users,
Zoomex is proud to announce that we have officially joined the CODE VASP Alliance (Connect Digital Exchanges) and successfully integrated the FATF Travel Rule compliance system.
This milestone highlights our commitment to meeting the security and transparency standards required of digital asset exchanges under the FATF Travel Rule framework, further strengthening our compliance in global and local market operations.
Founded in 2022, the CODE VASP Alliance aims to help Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASPs) meet Travel Rule compliance requirements. Supported by this system, identity information between the sending and receiving parties can be securely and encryptively transmitted, enhancing transaction transparency and traceability.
This integration further strengthens Zoomex’s infrastructure in security, compliance, and information governance, reaffirming our brand philosophy of “Simple × User-Friendly × Ultra-Fast.” We are committed to providing a more stable, secure, and trustworthy trading environment for users worldwide.
In addition, Zoomex has obtained multiple regulatory licenses, including Canada MSB, U.S. MSB, U.S. NFA, and Australia AUSTRAC, and has successfully passed a system security audit by Hacken, a globally recognized cybersecurity firm.
Thank you for your continued trust and support. As always, Zoomex remains dedicated to delivering a safe, fast, and seamless trading experience for every user.
Wishing you successful trades,
The Zoomex Team

title: Zoomex Strategy Center is officially live!
content:
Zoomex Strategy Center is now officially live!
Choose your strategy and easily start automated trading.
The Zoomex Strategy Center is an automated trading product that integrates historical backtesting, backtest result review, live trading, and position monitoring, helping users complete the full process from strategy testing to automated execution.
Whether you are a beginner exploring technical indicators, a trader with existing strategies but no automation capability, or a user looking to reduce strategy operation and maintenance costs, you can experience strategy trading more easily.
Supported Strategies
Currently supported technical indicator strategies:
- RSI (Relative Strength Index)
- BOLL (Bollinger Bands)
- Momentum
- RSI + BOLL
Supported trading directions:
- Long
- Short
- Dual-direction (Long + Short)
Supported trading products:
BTCUSDT Perpetual Contract (USDT-margined)
ETHUSDT Perpetual Contract (USDT-margined)
The system will automatically execute entries and exits based on real-time market data and strategy conditions.
Backtesting Feature
Before starting a strategy, you can run historical backtesting.
Users can configure different strategies, parameters, and candlestick intervals to review simulated performance in historical markets.
After backtesting, you can:
- View results
- Save configuration
- One-click copy to live trading
Live Trading
After backtesting, you can start live strategy trading.
Once activated, the system will automatically:
- Monitor the market
- Place orders
- Close positions
- Update trading data in real time
Strategy trading uses an independent strategy account fund model.
Before activation, users will be prompted to transfer available USDT from their trading account to the strategy account.
During operation, margin can be added via the “Funds Transfer” feature on the page.
After stopping the strategy, the system will:
- Close all positions immediately
- Automatically transfer funds back to the trading account
In addition, strategy trading supports optional take-profit and stop-loss settings, providing more flexible risk management.
Fees
No additional fees are charged for strategy trading.
Only standard platform trading fees apply.
Fee discounts from vouchers also apply to strategy center trading.
Risk Warning:
Strategy trading and backtesting results are for reference only and do not constitute investment advice. Backtest data is simulated based on historical market conditions, and live results may differ due to market volatility and real-time fluctuations. Digital asset trading involves high risk; please participate with caution.
*The Strategy Center is currently only available on the web version. The mobile version will be launched later. Stay tuned.

title: Get a Sneak Peek of the New UTA in 90 Seconds!
content:
Dear Valued User,
The Zoomex Unified Trading Account (UTA) is coming soon!
We’ve prepared a short video to help you quickly understand UTA’s powerful features and key upgrades.
🎥 Watch Now: Discover how UTA makes trading simpler and more efficient!
👉 Click here to watch on YouTube
🔍 What is UTA?
The Unified Trading Account is an “all-in-one” trading model that integrates Spot, Derivatives, and other products into a single account — eliminating the need to switch between multiple accounts or wallets.
⭐️ UTA Core Features & Highlights
1. Unified Account Assets:
Manage Spot and Futures assets in one UTA account — no need to switch between accounts.
2. Multi-Asset Collateral:
Use multiple crypto assets as collateral or margin to maximize capital efficiency.
3. Flexible Margin Modes:
Supports both Isolated and Cross Margin modes.
- Isolated Margin: Each position is calculated separately, ideal for beginners.
- Cross Margin: All positions share the same margin; profits can offset losses — ideal for users with larger capital or diverse strategies.
4. Unrealized PnL as Margin:
Use unrealized profits from open derivative positions as margin to enhance trading flexibility.
5. USD-Valued Balance Display:
View total asset value and margin status in USD for unified management and clearer insight.
⚠️ Key Differences Between UTA and Classic Accounts
1. Margin Efficiency
- Classic Account:
Each product account’s funds are calculated separately. Idle funds cannot be shared across products, resulting in lower capital utilization.
- UTA:
All assets are centralized in one account and can be used as global margin.
In other words, whether you trade Spot, Futures, or other products, your funds can be flexibly allocated — greatly improving efficiency.
2. Risk Management & Maintenance Margin
- Classic Account:
Uses isolated risk management — each account or product’s risk is calculated independently.
If one account is liquidated, other accounts remain unaffected.
- UTA:
Uses cross-account risk management. The system evaluates total assets and positions to calculate overall risk.
Profitable positions can offset losing ones, providing more intuitive and flexible risk management.
3. Product Coverage
- Classic Account:
Different products (e.g., Spot, Perpetual Contracts) must be managed separately, with manual transfers between accounts.
- UTA:
Trade multiple products — including Spot and Perpetual Contracts — within one account, supporting cross-product hedging.
Operations are more streamlined, and the trading experience is smoother.
📘 Want to Learn More?
Check out our New Trading Account Guide for detailed information.
The upgrade is coming soon — stay tuned to experience a smoother and more flexible way to trade!
Best regards,
Zoomex Team

title: Thông báo về việc ngừng giao dịch preSPAX và phương án bồi thường mua lại của nền tảng
content:
Kính gửi Quý người dùng,
Do phía dự án preSPAX xuất hiện bất thường trong việc tiếp nhận thanh khoản và khớp lệnh giao dịch, nhằm đảm bảo trải nghiệm xử lý tài sản cho người dùng, nền tảng sẽ tiến hành mua lại và hoàn trả thống nhất cho những người dùng đủ điều kiện đang nắm giữ preSPAX.
Cặp giao dịch preSPAX/USDT sẽ ngừng giao dịch vào lúc 03:00 ngày 2/7/2026 (UTC). Sau thời điểm này, các chức năng mua, bán và đặt lệnh mới sẽ không còn được hỗ trợ.
Sau khi giao dịch ngừng, hệ thống sẽ xử lý thống nhất các lệnh chưa khớp và các lệnh khớp một phần. USDT bị đóng băng trong lệnh mua sẽ được hoàn trả về tài khoản người dùng; preSPAX bị đóng băng trong lệnh bán sẽ được giải phóng về tài sản khả dụng và được tính vào thống kê mua lại sau đó. Phần đã khớp lệnh sẽ được ghi nhận vào lịch sử tài sản theo kết quả giao dịch thực tế.
Nền tảng sẽ lấy giá đóng cửa của preSPAX vào lúc 00:00 ngày 2/7/2026 (UTC) làm căn cứ xác nhận giá mua lại cuối cùng, quy đổi số dư preSPAX của người dùng đủ điều kiện và hoàn trả bằng USDT vào tài khoản người dùng trong cùng ngày.
Đồng thời, để cảm ơn sự thông cảm và ủng hộ của người dùng, nền tảng sẽ tặng thêm 50 USDT Bonus hợp đồng nền tảng cho những người dùng đủ điều kiện như một khoản bồi thường.
Các thẻ sản phẩm, lối vào giao dịch và chức năng mua bán liên quan đến preSPAX sẽ chính thức được gỡ xuống vào lúc 03:00 ngày 3/7/2026 (UTC). Sau khi gỡ xuống, người dùng sẽ không thể tiếp tục truy cập các trang giao dịch liên quan đến preSPAX.

title: [Spot] ARX hiện đã ra mắt trên Zoomex Spot!
content:
Người dùng Zoomex thân mến,
Chúng tôi rất vui mừng thông báo rằng ARX hiện đã ra mắt trên Zoomex Spot!
Chi tiết ra mắt:
- Nạp ARX mở: 25/06/2026, lúc 10:00 (UTC)
- Giao dịch Spot ARX bắt đầu: 25/06/2026, lúc 10:00 (UTC)
- Rút ARX mở: 25/06/2026, lúc 10:00 (UTC)
Vui lòng lưu ý rằng có thể xảy ra chậm trễ. Nạp tiền và rút tiền sẽ được xử lý qua mạng SOL.
Về ARX:
Arcium là một mạng máy tính bảo mật phi tập trung cho phép các ứng dụng xử lý dữ liệu nhạy cảm mà không tiết lộ nó cho bất kỳ bên nào. Được hỗ trợ bởi Phép tính nhiều bên (MPC) nâng cao, Arcium cho phép dữ liệu vẫn được mã hóa trong suốt quá trình tính toán, mở khóa các trường hợp sử dụng an toàn trên AI, tài chính, danh tính, chăm sóc sức khỏe và các ngành sử dụng dữ liệu yên cầu khác. Mạng bao gồm các nút Arx phi tập trung cộng tác để thực hiện tính toán trên dữ liệu được chia sẻ bí mật. Các nút này được tổ chức thành các cụm và hoạt động trong các Môi trường thực thi MPC có thể tùy chỉnh (MXE), cho phép các nhà phát triển xác định các giả định bảo mật, tham số tính toán và cài đặt thực thi. Thông qua các bảo đảm mật mã và khuyến khích kinh tế, Arcium cung cấp tính toán không cần tin cậy, bảo mật và có thể xác minh quy mô. Thường được mô tả là ""Siêu máy tính bảo mật"", Arcium kết hợp hệ điều hành phân tán của nó, arxOS, với MXE và khung công tác nhà phát triển Arcis để giúp xây dựng các ứng dụng bảo toàn quyền riêng tư dễ dàng hơn. Bằng cách cho phép cộng tác dữ liệu an toàn mà không hy sinh tính bảo mật, Arcium nhằm trở thành cơ sở hạ tầng nền tảng cho thế hệ ứng dụng phi tập trung và ưu tiên quyền riêng tư tiếp theo.
Ký hiệu: ARX
Địa chỉ hợp đồng:
SOL:

Được xây dựng trên công nghệ zero-knowledge (bằng chứng không tri thức), nó cho phép người dùng chứng minh mình là người thật mà không cần tiết lộ dữ liệu cá nhân. Bằng cách cho phép xác minh an toàn, ẩn danh trên các thiết bị và nền tảng, Billions nhằm mục đích giải quyết vấn đề ngày càng tăng về danh tính giả và các tương tác AI thiếu trách nhiệm trong thế giới kỹ thuật số. Mạng lưới cung cấp các công cụ cho cả cá nhân và nhà phát triển, bao gồm xác minh con người, chứng chỉ danh tính có thể tái sử dụng và danh tính tác nhân AI có thể xác minh. Người dùng có thể tạo hồ sơ chính thức, tạo dựng uy tín thông qua các huy hiệu đã xác minh và duy trì quyền kiểm soát dữ liệu của họ. Đối với các nhà phát triển, Billions cung cấp cơ sở hạ tầng để xây dựng các ứng dụng yêu cầu sự tin cậy, danh tính và danh tiếng mà không làm ảnh hưởng đến quyền riêng tư của người dùng. Với tầm nhìn về một nền kinh tế tin cậy toàn cầu, Billions Network đang xây dựng một hệ thống có khả năng mở rộng, nơi danh tính và danh tiếng có thể được xác minh liền mạch giữa các hệ sinh thái. Được hỗ trợ bởi các quan hệ đối tác và tích hợp với các tổ chức lớn cũng như hệ sinh thái blockchain, nó nhằm mục đích tạo ra một tương lai nơi mọi tương tác giữa con người và AI đều an toàn, minh bạch và đáng tin cậy.

Về USD1 (World Liberty Financial USD):
USD1 là một stablecoin được bảo chứng bằng đồng Đô la Mỹ, được ra mắt vào tháng 3 năm 2025 bởi World Liberty Financial (WLFI) với sự hợp tác của Binance. Ban đầu được phát hành trên Ethereum và Binance Smart Chain, USD1 được bảo chứng hoàn toàn theo tỷ lệ 1:1 bởi các tín phiếu Kho bạc Hoa Kỳ ngắn hạn, tiền gửi đô la và các khoản tương đương tiền khác. Các khoản dự trữ được nắm giữ bởi đơn vị lưu ký tổ chức BitGo, được kiểm toán bởi các công ty kế toán bên thứ ba và được xác minh thông qua cơ chế Bằng chứng Dự trữ (Proof-of-Reserves - PoR) của Chainlink nhằm đảm bảo tính minh bạch và bảo mật. Được quản lý tập trung bởi WLFI, USD1 bao gồm các tính năng như đóng băng tài khoản, đưa vào danh sách đen các giao dịch và các quyền kiểm soát chính sách có thể điều chỉnh. Dự án nhằm mục đích thu hẹp khoảng cách giữa tài chính truyền thống (TradFi) và tài chính phi tập trung (DeFi), cung cấp một giải pháp thay thế tuân thủ pháp lý và có liên kết chính trị đối với các stablecoin thuật toán hoặc không được kiểm soát. WLFI định vị USD1 là một tài sản an toàn, sẵn sàng cho các tổ chức, được thiết kế riêng cho các giao dịch xuyên biên giới liền mạch. Sự liên kết với gia đình Trump mang lại một dấu ấn thương hiệu chính trị độc đáo cho USD1, thúc đẩy sự quan tâm đáng kể từ thị trường. Sự chú ý này đã giúp token thu hút được cả nhà đầu tư cá nhân và tổ chức. WLFI nhấn mạnh rằng USD1 mang lại uy tín và sự bảo vệ của tài chính truyền thống trong khi vẫn thúc đẩy sự đổi mới của DeFi — khiến nó trở thành một lựa chọn hấp dẫn cho cả các quỹ tài sản chủ quyền và các tổ chức tài chính lớn.
